com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer

Class PrinterInfo.A4EquivalentByJobCategory

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer.PrinterInfo.A4EquivalentByJobCategory
  • Enclosing class:
    PrinterInfo

    public class PrinterInfo.A4EquivalentByJobCategory
extends java.lang.Object
    A4Equivalent impressions of Job information by category
    Since:
    API 7

    • Constructor Detail

      • A4EquivalentByJobCategory

        public A4EquivalentByJobCategory()

    • Method Detail

      • getJobCategory

        public java.lang.String getJobCategory()
        Retrieves Category string of job
        Returns:

        Job Category

        • Return value will be the category of the jobs e.g: Copy, Fax, Send etc
        • Return value will not be null

        Since:
        API 5

      • getJobCategoryType

        public SubUnitInfo.JobCategory getJobCategoryType()
        Retrieves Category Type of job
        Returns:

        Job category type

        • Return value will be the category type of the jobs e.g: COPY, FAX, OTHER etc
        • Return value will be of the type SubUnitInfo.JobCategory

        Since:
        API 5

      • getColorDeciImpressions

        public int getColorDeciImpressions()
        Retrieves Color Deci Impressions
        Returns:

        Color Deci Impressions

        • Return value will be greater than or equal to zero

        Since:
        API 5

      • getMonoDeciImpressions

        public int getMonoDeciImpressions()
        Retrieves Mono Deci Impressions
        Returns:

        Mono Deci Impressions

        • Return value will be greater than or equal to zero

        Since:
        API 5

      • getTotalDeciImpressions

        public int getTotalDeciImpressions()
        Retrieves Total Deci Impressions
        Returns:

        Total Deci Impressions

        • Return value will be greater than or equal to zero

        Since:
        API 5
